description: Production-grade plugin hooks: cross-session project enforcement (SessionStart) and oracle-gate inner-loop enforcement (PostToolUse, loop-protocol Rule 7)

hooks.command: _R="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && _R=$(for d in "$HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/nagisanzenin/production-grade"/*/; do [ -f "$d/hooks/session-guard.sh" ] && echo "$d"; done | sort -V | tail -1); _R="${_R%/}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && _R="$HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/nagisanzenin/production-grade"; bash "$_R/hooks/session-guard.sh"

_R="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && _R=$(for d in "$HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/nagisanzenin/production-grade"/*/; do [ -f "$d/hooks/oracle-gate.sh" ] && echo "$d"; done | sort -V | tail -1); _R="${_R%/}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && _R="$HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/nagisanzenin/production-grade"; bash "$_R/hooks/oracle-gate.sh"
